steps.expected: Dashboard shows metric cards with counts
steps.observed: Dashboard shows: Agents=2, Open Issues=2, Live Runs=1, Pending Approvals=1

steps.expected: Agent list count matches dashboard Agents metric
steps.observed: Agent list shows 2 agents (CEO, Founding Engineer) — matches dashboard count of 2

steps.expected: Issue count matches dashboard Open Issues metric
steps.observed: Issues page shows 2 issues (ACM-1 blocked, ACM-2 in_progress) — matches dashboard count of 2

VAL-CROSS-006.notes: Dashboard metric cards correctly reflect the actual data counts. Agent count (2) matches agents list page count. Issue count (2) matches issues page count.

steps.expected: All agents from Supabase displayed with name, role, status, adapter type
steps.observed: 2 seed agents displayed: (1) CEO — role: ceo, adapter: Claude Code (local), status: pending_approval; (2) Founding Engineer — role: founding_engineer, adapter: Codex (local), status: running

VAL-AGENT-001.notes: Both seed agents render with all required information: name, role, status indicator (color dot), and adapter type badge.

steps.expected: Agent detail page shows all properties
steps.observed: Detail page shows: Name=CEO, Role=ceo, Title=CEO, Status=pending_approval, Adapter Type=Claude Code (local), Reports To=None (root), Capabilities=Strategy/planning/delegation/approval routing, Private Cognition=Disabled, Created/Updated timestamps. Adapter Configuration panel shows JSON config. Bottom sections show Recent Runs (1 failed run) and Assigned Issues (ACM-1 blocked).

VAL-AGENT-003.notes: Agent detail page displays all required properties: name, role, status, adapter type, configuration details (adapter JSON config, capabilities, private cognition), and associated data (recent runs, assigned issues).

steps.expected: Form with name, title, role selector, reports_to picker, adapter type dropdown
steps.observed: Form rendered with: Name input (required), Title input, Role selector (12 role options), Reports To picker (lists existing agents), Adapter Type dropdown (9 adapter types). Create Agent button initially disabled.

steps.action: Fill form: Name='Test Validator Agent', Title='QA Test Agent', Role=Engineer, Reports To=CEO, Adapter Type=Codex (local)
steps.expected: Fields populated, Create Agent button enabled
steps.observed: All fields filled successfully. Adapter-specific config fields appeared (Agent instructions file, Bypass sandbox, Enable search). Create Agent button became enabled.

steps.expected: Agent created in Supabase, redirected to agent detail
steps.observed: Redirected to agent detail page showing: Name=Test Validator Agent, Role=engineer, Title=QA Test Agent, Status=idle, Adapter Type=Codex (local), Reports To=(CEO UUID), Created=just now. Adapter Configuration JSON visible.

VAL-AGENT-002.notes: Agent creation form fully functional. All required fields present. Selecting an adapter type dynamically shows adapter-specific configuration fields. Submission creates agent in Supabase and redirects to its detail page.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All agent management features (list, detail, create) and cross-view data consistency verified with seed data. Agent creation form successfully creates a new agent in Supabase with all required fields.
